post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a Bearer token
Creates a new user record in the database
Creates an order for the authenticated seller or for a specific seller if the requester is an admin. Validates that all products belong to the target seller.

seller_id.description: Required only if requester is an admin. Specifies the owner of the products and order.

quantity.description: Total cumulative quantity of all items

403.description: Forbidden - Attempting to order products not owned by the target seller

message.example: Forbidden. You can only create orders for products you own.
The customer phone field is required.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of orders. Admins can view all orders across the system, while regular sellers see only their own orders.

put.description: Allows a seller to update their own order or an Admin to update any order. Note: Updating the status property will trigger the OrderObserver logic.

parameters.name: order
parameters.description: The ID of the order record

status.description: The new status of the order. Triggers business logic in the Observer.

note.example: Customer requested delivery to back door.
Customer requested delivery to back door.

403.description: Forbidden - Unauthorized to update this order

delete.description: Permanently deletes an order and removes its associations with products. Sellers can delete their own orders, while Admins can delete any order.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the order to delete

403.description: Forbidden - Unauthorized to delete this order

post.description: Allows sellers to create their own products and admins to create products for any user. Admins MUST provide a seller_id.

seller_id.description: Required only if the authenticated user is an admin. The ID of the user who will own the product.

403.description: Unauthorized - User does not have permission to create products

message.example: The seller id field is required when user is admin.

patch.description: Allows sellers to update their own products and admins to update any product. Fields are optional (PATCH).

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: The ID of the product to update

403.description: Forbidden - Unauthorized to modify this product

message.example: Unauthorized. You can only modify your own products.
The price must be at least 0.

delete.description:
Permanently deletes a product record. Restrictions:
        1. Only the product owner (seller) or an Admin can delete the product.
        2. Products attached to active (undelivered) orders cannot be deleted.

parameters.name: product
parameters.description: The ID of the product to delete

403.description: Forbidden - Unauthorized to delete this product

message.example: Unauthorized. You can only delete your own products.

422.description: Unprocessable Content - Product has active orders

message.example: Cannot delete product. It is attached to active orders that have not been delivered yet.

get.description: Returns a list of products. Admins can view all products with seller details, while sellers see only their own products.

post.summary: Assign a permission to a specific role

parameters.name: role
parameters.description: The ID or Name of the role

post.summary: Remove a permission from a specific role

patch.description: Increases or decreases the stock of a product. Sellers can adjust their own products, while Admins can adjust any product. Prevents stock from going below zero.

quantity.description: The amount to add or subtract

403.description: Forbidden - Unauthorized to adjust this product

message.example: you are not authorized to ajust this products stock

422.description: Unprocessable Content - Insufficient stock or validation error

post.summary: Assign a new role to a user
post.description: Adds a role to the user without removing existing ones. Requires 'update users' permission.

role_name.description: The name of the role existing in the database

422.description: Validation error - role name is required or does not exist

post.description: Wipes all existing roles and replaces them with the new specified role. Requires 'update users' permission.
